title: Navin's is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Navin's is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
